evals.prompt: I need certificate monitoring for example.com using the previous snapshot baseline.json.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-change-detection skill for this certificate change detection request and produce the documented result for example.com using the previous snapshot baseline.json.
expectations: Selects certificate-change-detection for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_detect_change.
Keeps the response focused on detecting certificate changes over time - renewal, key rotation, issuer change, or expiry.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused certificate change detection workflow for example.com using the previous snapshot baseline.json; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-change-detection skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects certificate-change-detection instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
